items.title: Nvidia shows off DLSS 5 with three AI modes for different levels of detail — upscaler can switch between models in real-time
items.summary: DLSS 5 gets a second showing with Nvidia opening up the upscaler to object-level tweaking for developers with three different models.

items.title: China is considering export controls on AI technologies, including banning local companies from using TSMC, report claims — restrictions would also cover advanced AI models, training data, and overseas acquisitions
items.summary: China's Ministry of Commerce (MofCom) considers to restrict exports of advanced AI models, training data, and overseas acquisitions of strategically important technology companies; prohibit usage of foreign semiconductor manufacturing services.

items.summary_zh: 中国商务部考虑限制先进人工智能模型、训练数据的出口以及具有战略意义的科技公司的海外收购；禁止使用外国半导体制造服务。

items.title: Amazon data center in Bahrain struck and destroyed by Iranian cruise missiles, state media claims — attacks launched against AWS site in response to alleged US strikes on an under-construction nuclear plant
items.summary: The Amazon site has suffered multiple hits since the start of the U.S. bombing campaign in Iran. The IRGC claims to have 'destroyed' AWB Bahrain, but the company has moved operations off the facility since early April.
items.title_original: Amazon data center in Bahrain struck and destroyed by Iranian cruise missiles, state media claims — attacks launched against AWS site in response to alleged US strikes on an under-construction nuclear plant
items.title_en: Amazon data center in Bahrain struck and destroyed by Iranian cruise missiles, state media claims — attacks launched against AWS site in response to alleged US strikes on an under-construction nuclear plant
items.title_bilingual: Amazon data center in Bahrain struck and destroyed by Iranian cruise missiles, state media claims — attacks launched against AWS site in response to alleged US strikes on an under-construction nuclear plant
items.summary_zh: 自美国对伊朗发动轰炸以来，亚马逊网站遭受多次攻击。伊斯兰革命卫队声称已经“摧毁”了巴林 AWB，但该公司自 4 月初以来已将业务从该设施转移出去。

items.title: Behind the scenes at Nvidia's Engineering SuperLab — Vera Rubin NVL72 running OpenAI workloads, 800VDC demonstrated, and more
items.summary: Nvidia gave Tom’s Hardware an exclusive look inside its previously undisclosed Engineering SuperLab near Nvidia HQ, where we saw Vera Rubin NVL72 in action.
items.title_original: Behind the scenes at Nvidia's Engineering SuperLab — Vera Rubin NVL72 running OpenAI workloads, 800VDC demonstrated, and more

items.summary_zh: Nvidia 向 Tom’s Hardware 独家展示了其位于 Nvidia 总部附近的先前未公开的工程超级实验室，我们在那里看到了 Vera Rubin NVL72 的运行情况。

items.title: Nvidia deep dives Vera CPU for AI data centers — SPEC CPU 2026 benchmarks revealed, Olympus architecture specifics, and more
items.summary: Nvidia reveals all of the details about its Vera data center CPU, including an architectural breakdown of the Olympus core and the first (unofficial) SPEC CPU 2026 results.

items.title_en: Nvidia deep dives Vera CPU for AI data centers — SPEC CPU 2026 benchmarks revealed, Olympus architecture specifics, and more

items.title: Nvidia has shipped 'hundreds of thousands of Grace standalone servers’ — GPU firm pivots messaging as CPUs take center stage in agentic data centers
items.summary: As Nvidia continues to roll out Vera, its first custom CPU for agentic AI, it revealed that its last-gen Grace design has seen mass deployments, even as a standalone CPU for non-agentic workloads.
items.title_original: Nvidia has shipped 'hundreds of thousands of Grace standalone servers’ — GPU firm pivots messaging as CPUs take center stage in agentic data centers
items.title_en: Nvidia has shipped 'hundreds of thousands of Grace standalone servers’ — GPU firm pivots messaging as CPUs take center stage in agentic data centers
items.title_bilingual: Nvidia has shipped 'hundreds of thousands of Grace standalone servers’ — GPU firm pivots messaging as CPUs take center stage in agentic data centers
items.summary_zh: 随着 Nvidia 继续推出首款用于代理 AI 的定制 CPU Vera，该公司透露其最新一代 Grace 设计已得到大规模部署，甚至可以作为用于非代理工作负载的独立 CPU。

items.title: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
items.summary: The trend towards larger AI models continues, with China's new Kimi K3 model. With its trillions of parameters, it's just as capable as the best the West has to offer, and it's cheaper. But it's not as fast, giving rise to a new battle to balance performance, efficiency, and cost, alongside sovereign control.
items.title_original: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
items.title_en: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
items.title_bilingual: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
items.summary_zh: 大型人工智能模型的趋势仍在继续，中国推出了新的 Kimi K3 模型。凭借其数万亿个参数，它的功能与西方所能提供的最好的产品一样强大，而且价格更便宜。但它并没有那么快，引发了一场平衡性能、效率和成本以及主权控制的新斗争。

items.title: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
items.summary: We paired up and tested a pair of Dell's Pro Max with GB10, to see what a small cluster of Nvidia's Spark silicon can do. At $6332 each, as of writing, it's still an expensive prospect, but far cheaper and more desk-friendly than a big server box full of GPUs and the other necessary high-end hardware.
items.title_original: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
items.title_en: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
items.title_bilingual: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
items.summary_zh: 我们将一对戴尔 Pro Max 与 GB10 配对并进行了测试，看看一小群 Nvidia 的 Spark 芯片可以做什么。截至撰写本文时，它的售价为每台 6332 美元，仍然是一个昂贵的前景，但比装满 GPU 和其他必要高端硬件的大型服务器盒子便宜得多，也更适合桌面使用。

items.title: Anthropic hit with largest-ever $1.5 billion penalty in copyright lawsuit — court says training AI on published material is fair use, but startup’s pirated library infringes on authors’ rights
items.summary: The settlement was finally approved by a U.S. federal judge, with a majority of the plaintiffs accepting the amount. A few members of the group refused, citing the small amount compared to the number of infringed titles, and are pursuing a separate lawsuit of their own.
items.title_original: Anthropic hit with largest-ever $1.5 billion penalty in copyright lawsuit — court says training AI on published material is fair use, but startup’s pirated library infringes on authors’ rights
items.title_en: Anthropic hit with largest-ever $1.5 billion penalty in copyright lawsuit — court says training AI on published material is fair use, but startup’s pirated library infringes on authors’ rights
items.title_bilingual: Anthropic hit with largest-ever $1.5 billion penalty in copyright lawsuit — court says training AI on published material is fair use, but startup’s pirated library infringes on authors’ rights
items.summary_zh: 该和解协议最终获得美国联邦法官的批准，大多数原告接受了该金额。该组织的一些成员拒绝了，理由是与侵权作品的数量相比，金额很小，并正在单独提起诉讼。

items.title: Intel to co-develop and manufacture Fortinet's next-gen firewall ASIC on Intel 4 — node gets its first named external customer
items.summary: SP6 will draw on what the companies described as Intel's expertise in disaggregated semiconductor design and advanced packaging.

items.summary_zh: SP6将利用两家公司所描述的英特尔在分类半导体设计和先进封装方面的专业知识。

items.title: Z.ai powers up a 1-gigawatt AI data center built entirely on Chinese chips, report claims — GLM developer now runs multiple 10,000-chip clusters with zero Nvidia silicon
items.summary: Chinese AI developer Z.ai (formerly Zhipu) has finished building a 1GW data center stocked exclusively with domestically made chips and has switched part of it on.
items.title_original: Z.ai powers up a 1-gigawatt AI data center built entirely on Chinese chips, report claims — GLM developer now runs multiple 10,000-chip clusters with zero Nvidia silicon
items.title_en: Z.ai powers up a 1-gigawatt AI data center built entirely on Chinese chips, report claims — GLM developer now runs multiple 10,000-chip clusters with zero Nvidia silicon
items.title_bilingual: Z.ai powers up a 1-gigawatt AI data center built entirely on Chinese chips, report claims — GLM developer now runs multiple 10,000-chip clusters with zero Nvidia silicon
items.summary_zh: 中国人工智能开发商Z.ai（原智浦）已经完成了一座1GW的数据中心的建设，该数据中心全部采用国产芯片，并已部分启用。

items.title: TSMC eyes price hikes of up to 25% on chip production services in 2027, report claims — plans to raise baseline prices by 5% to 10% on advanced nodes
items.summary: TSMC reportedly intends to increase prices of wafers it processes citing demand, rising costs, and increased investments in new capacity.

items.summary_zh: 据报道，台积电打算提高其加工晶圆的价格，理由是需求、成本上升以及新产能投资的增加。

items.title: Intel layoffs to hit Data Center group — division focused on server CPUs, AI chips, and data center architecture to be hit by an unknown number of cuts
items.summary: Intel plans to cut the employee numbers of its Data Center group, months after announcing record growth since its disastrous announcement in 2024.
items.title_original: Intel layoffs to hit Data Center group — division focused on server CPUs, AI chips, and data center architecture to be hit by an unknown number of cuts

items.summary_zh: 英特尔计划削减其数据中心部门的员工人数，数月前该部门宣布自 2024 年灾难性公告以来该部门的员工人数创历史新高。

items.title: SMIC's third-gen 7nm node shows smaller metal pitch than Intel 18A, higher transistor density than TSMC N6 without EUV — analysis of N+3 shows significant advancement for Chinese semi manufacturing
items.summary: SMIC's N+3 process technology can achieve transistor density comparable to TSMC's N6 without using EUV lithography, but it fails to deliver performance or efficiency of modern production nodes.

items.summary_zh: 中芯国际的N+3工艺技术可以在不使用EUV光刻的情况下实现与台积电N6相当的晶体管密度，但它无法提供现代生产节点的性能或效率。

items.title: Google reportedly developing 'Frozen v2' chip with Gemini's architecture etched into the silicon — engineers project 6 to 10 times more tokens per watt than latest TPUs
items.summary: Google is developing a server chip, informally dubbed "Frozen v2," that would etch part of its Gemini model's architecture directly into the silicon.

items.title_bilingual: Google reportedly developing 'Frozen v2' chip with Gemini's architecture etched into the silicon — engineers project 6 to 10 times more tokens per watt than latest TPUs
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在开发一种服务器芯片，非正式地称为“Frozen v2”，它将将其 Gemini 模型的部分架构直接蚀刻到硅中。

items.title: PC modder bolts 5.5-pound aluminum heatsink to RTX 4060 — convection-only cooling seems to work fine in a testbench-style installation
items.summary: A PC gamer has DIYed a passive Nvidia GeForce RTX 4060 graphics card system incorporating a 5.5-pound aluminum heatsink.

items.title: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
items.summary: Nvidia has just created an antidote to the virus that is AI misinformation. The company's new Synthetic Video Detector can help broadcasters assess 1080p footage at scale with processing times of just 22ms and up 92% accuracy for uncompressed videos.
items.title_original: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
items.title_en: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
items.title_bilingual: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
items.summary_zh: 英伟达刚刚创造了一种病毒的解药，那就是人工智能错误信息。该公司的新型合成视频检测器可以帮助广播公司大规模评估 1080p 素材，处理时间仅为 22 毫秒，未压缩视频的准确度高达 92%。

items_ai.title: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
items_ai.summary: The trend towards larger AI models continues, with China's new Kimi K3 model. With its trillions of parameters, it's just as capable as the best the West has to offer, and it's cheaper. But it's not as fast, giving rise to a new battle to balance performance, efficiency, and cost, alongside sovereign control.
items_ai.title_original: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
items_ai.title_en: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
items_ai.title_bilingual: Kimi K3 rocks the AI industry as Moonshot AI undercuts closed-source American competitors on price — but the huge 2.8T open-weight model still needs serious hardware to deploy at scale
items_ai.summary_zh: 大型人工智能模型的趋势仍在继续，中国推出了新的 Kimi K3 模型。凭借其数万亿个参数，它的功能与西方所能提供的最好的产品一样强大，而且价格更便宜。但它并没有那么快，引发了一场平衡性能、效率和成本以及主权控制的新斗争。

items_ai.title: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
items_ai.summary: We paired up and tested a pair of Dell's Pro Max with GB10, to see what a small cluster of Nvidia's Spark silicon can do. At $6332 each, as of writing, it's still an expensive prospect, but far cheaper and more desk-friendly than a big server box full of GPUs and the other necessary high-end hardware.
items_ai.title_original: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
items_ai.title_en: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
items_ai.title_bilingual: Local AI clustering with Dell's Pro Max GB10 — connecting two Nvidia Grace Blackwell to scale out AI compute at home
